services.title: Twilio query
services.summary: Diff SIP trunks and phone numbers vs config; optional --import from live API (JSON on stdout).

next_steps: Run `hdc run infrastructure twilio query -- --import --yes` to refresh hdc-private config from the live account.
Copy `termination_domain` from sip_trunks[] into asterisk config when using Elastic SIP Trunking.
